commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the validation ordering and add focused regression coverage, while final security-boundary acceptance remains a maintainer decision.; Needs attention: The PR adds a new internal QuickJS guest-to-host bridge and still has a validation-ordering issue that can run host namespace factories for invalid code.; Review finding: [P2] Validate exec source before creating namespace runt... (sha=fdf4980975052dbccf3a0fcdfeb307a42430eddf)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an internal code-mode namespace registry and QuickJS bridge, docs, tests, and live repro scripts so host-owned namespace globals can call plugin-owned catalog tools from `exec`.

PR surface: Source +626, Tests +527, Docs +185, Other +738. Total +2076 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: `runExec` creates the namespace runtime before `prepareSource`, and `createCodeModeNamespaceRuntime` calls `createScope`. I did not run the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the validation ordering and add focused regression coverage, while final security-boundary acceptance remains a maintainer decision.
